name: Darren Soto
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $874,118 for Darren Soto in U.S. House, FL-09. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.
